title: Live API — text round trip
summary: Open a bidirectional Live session, send one text turn, accumulate the streamed text response, then close cleanly. The minimum-viable Live exchange before adding audio.
notes: client.aio.live.connect is async — the sample wraps it in asyncio.run for a one-shot demo.
response.server_content arrives in chunks; both model_turn.parts (structured) and output_transcription (audio→text) shapes appear depending on the active modality.
For voice agents add INPUT_AUDIO/OUTPUT_AUDIO modalities and stream PCM frames via send_realtime_input — Live samples for audio land separately.
